name: nummeropslag
description: Privacy-first Danish caller ID, company lookup, operator data, and spam signals.
long_description: Look up Danish phone numbers using official CVR company data, the Danish number plan, and privacy-preserving community spam signals. Nummeropslag does not expose names of private individuals. An API key is required.

tools.name: lookup_number
tools.description: Look up a Danish phone number and return company, operator, number type, and spam signals.

tools.name: check_spam
tools.description: Return a compact spam or scam verdict for a Danish phone number.

tools.name: get_operator
tools.description: Return the telecom operator and number type for a Danish phone number.

tools.name: search_businesses
tools.description: Search CVR-registered Danish businesses by name.

tools.name: api_status
tools.description: Show the configured API key's scopes and quota usage.

api_key.title: Nummeropslag API key
api_key.description: Create an API key at https://nummeropslag.dk/api-noegle
